CS110 (Bain): Spring 2022

Intro to Computer Programming with Python

CS110 (Bain): Spring 2022

  • Syllabus
  • Schedule
  • Assignments
  • Campuswire

Schedule

Note: This schedule is subject to change (as needed). In addition, unless otherwise indicated, tutorials are always due on Wednesday at 11:59PM and homework is always due on Friday at 11:59PM.

Week Lesson Topic Due
Week 1 03/29/22 Tue, 03/29 Lesson 0 Introduction
  • Intro to the course
03/30/22 Wed, 03/30 Lesson 1 Intro to Hardware and Software
  • What is computer?
  • What are some "real world" analogies?
  • How do we translate our thinking so the computer can understand?
04/01/22 Fri, 04/01 Lesson 2 Writing Programs
  • Programs, operators, and data types
HW0 Sign up for a Study Group / Tutorial Session
Week 2 04/04/22 Mon, 04/04 Lesson 3 Variables & Functions
  • Constants (Data) and their Types
  • Variables...what are they good for?
  • Using built-in Functions
04/06/22 Wed, 04/06 Lesson 4 More on Functions
  • Using functions
  • Reading function docs
Tutorial 1 Get Python Running
04/08/22 Fri, 04/08 Lesson 5 Writing Functions
  • More using functions
  • Writing our own functions
HW1 Introductory Exercises
Week 3 04/11/22 Mon, 04/11 Lesson 6 Tuples, Tkinter, and Lists
  • Exploring and defining functions
  • Lists and Tuples to store lots of data
  • Using TKinter
04/13/22 Wed, 04/13 Lesson 7 Practicing with Lists and Functions
  • Writing functions
  • More list abilities
  • Using these things to do something in TKinter
Tutorial 2 Practice with Functions
04/15/22 Fri, 04/15 Lesson 8 Writing Reporters
  • Talk about Quiz 1
  • More on defining functions
  • Using Lists/Tuples
  • Defining functions that report back values
HW2 Intro to Tkinter
Week 4 04/18/22 Mon, 04/18 Lesson 9 Variable Scope & More on Modules
  • Modules
  • Scope
  • Starting to Review
04/20/22 Wed, 04/20 Lesson 10 Review
  • More on Scope
  • Review for Q1
Tutorial 3 Practice with Parameters & Arguments
04/22/22 Fri, 04/22 quiz 1 Quiz 1 (In-Person)
  • Quiz 1 of 3 (using the Lockdown Browser)
QUIZ 1
Week 5 04/25/22 Mon, 04/25 Lesson 11 For Loops and Conditionals
  • Control Flow
  • For loops
  • A little on conditionals
04/27/22 Wed, 04/27 Lesson 12 Conditionals and While Loops
  • What do you want to repeat?
  • How long do you want to repeat it?
  • What changes each time (optional)?
Tutorial 4 For Loops Activity
04/29/22 Fri, 04/29 Lesson 13 More Practice: Loops and Conditionals
  • Practice using if / elif / else
  • Practice using while loops
HW3 Make a Creature
Week 6 05/02/22 Mon, 05/02 Lesson 14 Using Loops to Do Stuff
  • More on Conditionals
  • More Data and Loops
05/04/22 Wed, 05/04 Lesson 15 Loops to Process Data
  • Practice using for loops to process data
Tutorial 5 Practice with Conditionals and Loops
05/06/22 Fri, 05/06 Lesson 16 User Inputs & Events
  • Expanding your I/O repertoire
  • Click, drag, and keyboard events
HW4 Animations & Landscapes
Week 7 05/09/22 Mon, 05/09 Lesson 17 More on Events and Listeners
  • Looking at some common events
  • Writing handlers
05/11/22 Wed, 05/11 Lesson 18 Review for Quiz 2 Tutorial 6 Event Handlers
05/13/22 Fri, 05/13 quiz 2 Quiz 2 (In-Person)
  • Quiz 2 of 3 (using the Lockdown Browser)
QUIZ 2
Week 8 05/16/22 Mon, 05/16 Lesson 19 Files and Strings
  • reading from and writing to files
  • examining different file types
05/18/22 Wed, 05/18 Lesson 20 More on Files & Strings + Error Handling
  • Working with files
  • Error handling
Tutorial 7 Working With Files
05/20/22 Fri, 05/20 Lesson 21 More on Files and Funday Friday - PIP
  • PIP
  • 3rd Party Modules
P1 Make an Interactive Animation
Week 9 05/23/22 Mon, 05/23 Lesson 22 Complex Data and Dictionaries
  • Dictionaries
  • And more dictionaries!
05/25/22 Wed, 05/25 Lesson 23 Dictionaries for Representation and Downloading Files from the Web
  • Downloading data using APIs
  • Complex Data Storage in Dictionaries
Tutorial 8 Get Started with HW5
05/27/22 Fri, 05/27 Lesson 24 Dictionary Algorithms
  • The "counting algorithm"
  • The "grouping algorithm"
HW5 Building W0rdle
Week 10 05/30/22 Mon, 05/30 No Class (Memorial Day)
06/01/22 Wed, 06/01 Lesson 25 APIs and P2
06/03/22 Fri, 06/03 quiz 3 Quiz 3 (In-Person) QUIZ 3
Week 11 06/07/22 Tue, 06/07 P2: Make a Recommendation App

Department of Computer Science, Northwestern University.


Special thanks to Prof. Sarah Van Wart who assembled many parts of this curriculum.
